shop.policyNote: By clicking "place order", you agree to the personal data processing policy.

sections.title: 1. TERMS AND DEFINITIONS
sections.content:
1.1. This Privacy Policy uses the following terms: 
 1.1.1. “Personal data” - any information relating to a directly or indirectly identified or identifiable individual (data subject).

sections.title: 2. GENERAL PROVISIONS
sections.content: 2.1. The processing and security of personal data is carried out by the Company in accordance with the requirements of Federal Law No. 152-FZ of 27.07.2006 “On Personal Data”.

sections.title: 3. SUBJECT OF THE PRIVACY POLICY
sections.content: 3.1. This Privacy Policy establishes the Company's obligations regarding the non-disclosure and protection of the confidentiality of personal data.

sections.title: 4. PURPOSES OF COLLECTING PERSONAL INFORMATION
sections.content: 4.1. The Company may use the User's personal data for the purpose of establishing feedback, including sending notifications and requests related to the use of the Company's Website.

sections.title: 5. METHODS AND TERMS OF PROCESSING PERSONAL INFORMATION
sections.content: 5.1. Processing of the User's personal data is carried out without a time limit, by any lawful means, including in personal data information systems.

sections.title: 6. OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES
sections.content: 6.1. The User is obliged to: provide personal data information necessary to use the Company's Website. 6.2. The Company is obliged to: use the information received solely for the purposes specified in Section 4 of this Policy.

sections.title: 7. LIABILITY OF THE PARTIES
sections.content: 7.1. The Company, having failed to fulfill its obligations, is liable for losses incurred by the User in connection with the unlawful use of personal data.

sections.title: 8. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
sections.content: 8.1. Before going to court with a claim arising from the relationship between the User of the site and the Company, filing a claim is mandatory.

sections.title: 9. ADDITIONAL TERMS
sections.content: 9.1. The Company has the right to make changes to this Privacy Policy without the User's consent. 9.2. The new Policy takes effect upon its publication on the Website.
